creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Don Lewis from comment #55)

> I'm not seeing that here, even after upgrading the ports tree from r405759,
> which is what I originally used to generate and test the patch, to r409705.
> I tested with 10.1-RELEASE-p27 amd64.  No problems with 10.3-PRERELEASE
> r295020, either.

Right, I've lost a boost patch related to long double support, with it it does build fine.
